prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: enemy attack VFX sheet for Orbwalker
Primary request: create a production candidate VFX sprite sheet for enemy attack, block, shield, and HP-hit feedback as an opaque chroma-key source image.
Subject: ten compact VFX sprites in a 5x2 sheet: slash arc, heavy impact, shield block flash, armor crack, red damage burst, poison/dark swipe, stone shockwave, warning spike, enemy charge glow, small hit spark.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game VFX sprites, crisp mobile readability.
Composition/framing: 5x2 sprite sheet, each effect centered with padding, no clipping.
Color palette: red and orange impacts, blue and silver shields, dark violet enemy magic, white highlights, but absolutely no cyan inside effects.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid cyan key background #00FFFF only.
Constraints: exact one-color background #00FFFF; no checkerboard; no gradient; no texture; no vignette; no shadows touching background; no glow touching background; no particles touching background; no smoke touching background; no panel; no frame; no matte backdrop; no labels; no text; no logo; no watermark.
Avoid: absolutely no #00FFFF or near-cyan key tones inside any VFX sprite content.
notes: Opaque chroma-key fallback source candidate only; deterministic keyed-alpha extraction required before promotion.
